Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0410 "GUNFRIGHT-C400-0410" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $c400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Gunfright v1.10 (Rod & Emu - 2017).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $C400 which copies 256 bytes of data from $C410 down to $0300 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $0410 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
